headline: Can ADI's Strong Cash Flow and Inventory Strategy Drive Future Growth?
summary: Analog Devices' strong cash flow, low capital needs and strategic inventory build support growth while keeping its balance sheet and cash conversion resilient.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Neutral on Texas Instruments, Raises Price Target to $340
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst C.J. Muse   maintains Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $300 to $340.

headline: Texas Instruments: Buy On Pullbacks
summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) stays a Buy as industrial & data center growth boosts margins and free cash flow; valuation looks cheaper on pullbacks.
